title: oCd PvP Overlay
description: An overlay for combat meant for use with the oCd pack.
body:
Looking to use the oCd pack for PvP? This pack will help you! Put it on top of any oCd-style texture pack and jump right into combat.

# Features
All of the following things have been retextured or remodeled to make them easier to see during PvP and to make them fit in with oCd-style textures:
* Potions
* Totem of Undying
* Retextured End Crystal, 3D End Crystal item
* Diamond and Netherite Armor
* Shield
* Obsidian
* Respawn Anchor

# Credits
* [**rE-oCd**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/re-ocd) by _HoshinekoSanti_ inspired the pack and was used in the ``pack.png``. Its license can be found [here](https://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0)
* [**oCd**](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/ocd-pack/) by *disco_* created the original pack and inspired this entire project
